poke-red-ink.purpose: Text-safe Poké Red for accent-coloured small text on light surfaces (≥4.5:1).

ball-orange-ink.purpose: Text-safe Court Orange for accent-coloured small text on light surfaces (≥4.5:1).

win-light-red.purpose: Close dot on window/browser bars. Theme-independent macOS control color.

display.purpose: Hero name only, paired with the glitch type-in. VT323 bitmap face.

body.purpose: All prose, UI copy, and the terminal. Measure 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Tiny uppercase kickers, field labels, dock glyphs. Press Start 2P, 8-11px only.

shadows.name: window
shadows.purpose: Cornerstone elevation on every window, the dock, and the portrait card. No blur.

shadows.name: button-rest
shadows.purpose: Default chunky lift on buttons and link cards.

shadows.name: button-hover
shadows.purpose: Button rises toward the cursor on hover (paired with translate(-2px,-2px)).

shadows.name: button-press
shadows.purpose: Shadow fully collapses on :active; element translates(2px,2px) and sits into the desk.

motion.name: reveal
motion.purpose: Scroll-in reveal: opacity + translateY(28px)->0 via IntersectionObserver.

motion.name: theme-swap
motion.purpose: Background-color + color crossfade when theme/mode changes.

components.name: Window
components.description: The cornerstone OS chrome wrapper. Every section is a window: title bar with traffic lights, body, status bar.
components.html:
~/zahadad — about.md
readme

A window is the only container in zahadadOS. Nested cards are forbidden.

// aboutREADY
components.css: .ds-window { background:#fbf7eb; color:#15161a; border:2px solid #15161a; border-radius:4px; box-shadow:6px 6px 0 0 #15161a; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',Menlo,monospace; } .ds-window-bar { display:flex; align-items:center; gap:10px; height:32px; padding:0 12px; background:#e8dec5; border-bottom:2px solid #15161a; border-radius:2px 2px 0 0; font-size:12px; } .ds-lights { display:flex; gap:6px; } .ds-lights span { width:11px; height:11px; border-radius:50%; } .ds-lights span:nth-child(1){background:#ff5f57} .ds-lights span:nth-child(2){background:#febc2e} .ds-lights span:nth-child(3){background:#28c840} .ds-window-title { flex:1; text-align:center; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; } .ds-window-meta { font-size:11px; color:#4a4a52; } .ds-window-body { padding:32px; font-size:14px; line-height:1.55; } .ds-window-status { display:flex; justify-content:space-between; border-top:2px solid #15161a; padding:6px 12px; font-size:11px; color:#4a4a52; background:#e8dec5; }

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The dominant CTA. Ink fill, paper text, presses down into the desk.
components.css: .ds-btn { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:10px 18px; background:#fbf7eb; color:#15161a; border:2px solid #15161a; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.4px; border-radius:3px; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #15161a; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease, background .12s; } .ds-btn:hover { background:#cf3a2f; color:#fbf7eb; transform:translate(-2px,-2px); box-shadow:5px 5px 0 0 #15161a; } .ds-btn:active { transform:translate(2px,2px); box-shadow:0 0 0 0 #15161a; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #cf3a2f; outline-offset:3px; } .ds-btn-primary { background:#15161a; color:#fbf7eb; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#cf3a2f; color:#fbf7eb; }

components.name: Default Button
components.description: Secondary chunky button. Paper fill, accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn2 { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px; padding:10px 18px; background:#fbf7eb; color:#15161a; border:2px solid #15161a; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:0.4px; border-radius:3px; box-shadow:3px 3px 0 0 #15161a; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .12s ease, box-shadow .12s ease, background .12s; } .ds-btn2:hover { background:#cf3a2f; color:#fbf7eb; transform:translate(-2px,-2px); box-shadow:5px 5px 0 0 #15161a; } .ds-btn2:active { transform:translate(2px,2px); box-shadow:0 0 0 0 #15161a; } .ds-btn2:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #cf3a2f; outline-offset:3px; }

components.name: Chip
components.description: Tech tag / inline metadata. Tan default, ink-solid and accent variants.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; padding:4px 9px; background:#e8dec5; color:#15161a; border:1.5px solid #15161a; border-radius:3px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; letter-spacing:0.3px; white-space:nowrap; } .ds-chip-solid { background:#15161a; color:#fbf7eb; } .ds-chip-accent { background:#cf3a2f; color:#fbf7eb; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Form field with a tiny Press Start 2P label above. Tan fill, hard ink border, accent focus ring.
components.css: .ds-field { display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; } .ds-field-label { font-family:'Press Start 2P',monospace; font-size:8px; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#4a4a52; } .ds-input { background:#e8dec5; border:2px solid #15161a; padding:10px 12px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:13px; color:#15161a; width:100%; box-sizing:border-box; outline:none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#4a4a52; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #cf3a2f; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: Dock Icon
components.description: Bottom-dock app tile. Press Start 2P glyph, lifts and fills accent on hover with a tooltip.
components.html:
HM
PRJ
GME
components.css: .ds-dock { display:inline-flex; gap:6px; background:#e8dec5; border:2px solid #15161a; border-radius:8px; padding:6px; box-shadow:6px 6px 0 0 #15161a; } .ds-dock-icon { position:relative; width:44px; height:44px; display:grid; place-items:center; background:#fbf7eb; border:1.5px solid #15161a; border-radius:4px; font-family:'Press Start 2P',monospace; font-size:9px; color:#15161a; cursor:pointer; transition:transform .18s ease, background .18s ease, color .18s ease; } .ds-dock-icon::after { content:attr(data-tip); position:absolute; bottom:calc(100% + 8px); left:50%; transform:translateX(-50%); background:#15161a; color:#fbf7eb; padding:4px 8px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',monospace; font-size:11px; border-radius:3px; white-space:nowrap; opacity:0; pointer-events:none; transition:opacity .15s; } .ds-dock-icon:hover { transform:translateY(-4px) scale(1.08); background:#cf3a2f; color:#fbf7eb; } .ds-dock-icon:hover::after { opacity:1; }

narrative.overview: zahadadOS is a portfolio that boots like a beloved retro operating system: a BIOS log scrolling to READY., a name that glitches into focus, window chrome on every section, a dock, a live menubar, chiptune blips, and a games folder behind a Konami code. The OS framing is not decoration over a résumé — it is the brand. The mood is nostalgic, playful, and warm: cream-paper backgrounds with a faint dot-grid, a soft CRT scanline in dark mode, bitmap typefaces, and cartridge-bright primary accents. Underneath the fun the craft is real and precise; the playfulness reads as confidence, not gimmick. It explicitly rejects the generic SaaS landing page and the stiff corporate résumé, and never lets nostalgia beat legibility or speed.
keyCharacteristics: Everything lives inside macOS-meets-DOS window chrome — title bar with traffic lights, body, status bar.
Hard-offset shadows, never blur — surfaces read like printed stickers or physical UI tiles.
Bitmap + monospace type only — Press Start 2P, VT323, JetBrains Mono. Mono is literal (this is an OS), not costume.
Two themes × two modes — Pokémon / Basketball, light / dark — driven entirely by CSS custom properties.
Chunky, tactile interaction — 2px ink borders, press-to-collapse-shadow buttons, a custom pixel cursor.

rules.name: The Ink-Is-The-Line Rule
rules.body: Borders and shadows are always --line (Terminal Ink in light, CRT Cream in dark) at full opacity — never a softened gray, never a tint. The hard ink edge is the signature.

rules.name: The Theme-Mechanics-Stay-Fixed Rule
rules.body: Switching theme or mode re-binds hue and surface tokens only. Layout, border weight, shadow offset, and type never change. A component must look correct in all four combinations or it is unfinished.

rules.name: The Pixel-Caps-Are-Tiny Rule
rules.body: Press Start 2P is only ever used small (8-11px). It is a label and glyph face; large blocky text is unreadable. Headlines belong to VT323.

rules.name: The Functional-Kicker Rule
rules.body: The ▸ NN_SECTION kickers are a deliberate, named system (terminal prompt + numbered route), not generic AI eyebrows. Keep them consistent; don't sprinkle unrelated tracked-caps labels elsewhere.

rules.name: The No-Blur Rule
rules.body: box-shadow blur and spread radii are always 0. A blurred or soft shadow anywhere is a bug. Glassmorphism and ambient drop-shadows are forbidden.

rules.name: The Press-Collapses-Depth Rule
rules.body: Interactive elements map their shadow to state: larger offset on hover, zero offset on :active. The element travels the distance the shadow loses.

dos: Do wrap every new section in <Win> with id, title, meta, and a status, and keep the reveal class for scroll-in.
Do use var(--accent), var(--ink), var(--paper), var(--cream-2), var(--line) — never hardcoded hex — so all four theme×mode combinations stay correct.
Do keep borders and shadows at full-opacity --line with zero blur (Npx Npx 0 0 var(--line)).
Do map interaction to depth: hover grows the offset shadow, :active collapses it to 0 and translates the element down.
Do reserve VT323 for headings, Press Start 2P for tiny uppercase labels/glyphs, and JetBrains Mono for everything else.
Do keep --ink-mid (#4a4a52) for muted text — verified ≥4.5:1 on cream and paper. Test new text colors for contrast.
Do honor reduced motion: respect both @media (prefers-reduced-motion) and the in-app html[data-motion="reduced"] toggle.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS landing page — no Inter/DM Sans, no gradient hero, no three identical icon-heading-text feature cards, no decorative tracked-uppercase eyebrows outside the deliberate ▸ NN_SECTION system.
Don't ship anything that reads as a stiff corporate résumé — keep the voice wry and the OS framing intact.
Don't use blurred, soft, or ambient shadows, or glassmorphism. The only soft effect allowed is the dark-mode CRT scanline overlay.
Don't set Press Start 2P larger than ~11px, or VT323 as body text.
Don't invent bare cards or containers outside the window metaphor; nested cards are forbidden.
Don't let nostalgia beat legibility or performance — no low-contrast gray text on cream, no effects that drop frames.
Don't introduce rounded soft UI (large radii, pill buttons) — corners are sharp (2-8px max) and edges are hard.
